prompt: I manage social media for a 3-person team and we're on the Standard plan. I want to set up approval workflows so posts get reviewed before publishing.
assertions: Explains that approval workflows require the Advanced plan and are not available on Standard
Mentions the per-seat cost increase from Standard to Advanced pricing tier
Suggests an alternative workflow for post review on the Standard plan or recommends upgrading

prompt: Should I use Sprout Social's listening add-on or get a dedicated social listening tool like Brand24?
assertions: Compares Sprout Listening with standalone tools on coverage scope and pricing
Notes that Sprout Listening is social-focused and does not cover news, print, or broadcast media
Mentions the cost of Sprout's listening add-on relative to standalone alternatives

prompt: My Instagram account keeps disconnecting from Sprout Social every few days. How do I fix this?
assertions: Covers re-authentication steps in Sprout's Connected Profiles settings
Mentions that the authenticating user needs admin access to the Instagram Business account or Facebook Page
Addresses common causes like OAuth token expiration, password changes, or 2FA changes
